name: codex-usage-wrapper
author: CodexUsage
description: Local-first Codex and Claude usage forecasts, alerts, costs, and actions.

scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.test: npm run lint:rust && npm run test:rust && npm run test:ui
